description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'MiNiFi-CPP Verify Python Compatibility' that runs on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have two jobs: 'rocky-build' and 'docker-python-tests'. The 'rocky-build' job runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, builds a package, and uploads the artifact. The 'docker-python-tests' job runs on ubuntu-20.04, depends on 'rocky-build', and performs various tests on different platforms with Python.
